title: AFK Sit
body:
# AFK Sit

**Requires [Detect AFK Players](https://modrinth.com/datapack/detect-afk)**.

Players sit down while they're AFK. It's fun!

![Players at a campfire at sunset, two of whom are sitting, implied to be AFK.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daf6b5618ce798db68449aedfbdec2668c4ee724_0.webp)

Players will stand up again if they have no support underneath them or take damage.

To exclude a player from sitting, give them the `afk_sit.ignore` tag:

```
/tag PLAYER add afk_sit.ignore
```
